rationale: The ensures is an implication whose antecedent (all post1_/post2_ ensures) is NOT a free hypothesis in the body — that is why the previous flat `assert(post1_self_@ == pre_self_@.push(*new_value))` failed. Wrapping the proof in `if antecedent { ... }` brings the antecedent into scope as a hypothesis, lets sequence extensionality (`=~=`) discharge `post1_self_@ == post2_self_@` and hence `post1_self_.view() == post2_self_.view()`, and lines up both #[auto]-triggered forall ensures on a shared v through `pre_self_.get_node_ref(v)`.
